utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Whoa ... whoa , Treeger made you cry ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yes ! And he said really mean things that were only partly true .

emotion_cause.span: 2_he said really mean things that were only partly true .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am gonna go down there and teach that guy a lesson .

emotion_cause.span: 2_And he said really mean things that were only partly true .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Joey , please do not do that . I think it is best that we just forget about it .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: That is easy for you to say , you were not almost just killed .

emotion_cause.span: 4_please do not do that . I think it is best that we just forget about it .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right that is it , school is in session !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: My God ! Is this a gym card ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh yeah , gym member . I try to go four times a week , but I have missed the last 1200 times .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So why do not you quit ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You do not think I have tried ? You think I like having 50 dollars taken out of my bank account every month ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_You do not think I have tried ? You think I like having 50 dollars taken out of my bank account every month ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh Maria . You can not say no to her , she is like this lycra spandex covered gym ... treat .

emotion_cause.span: 12_You can not say no to her , she is like this lycra spandex covered gym ... treat .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You need me to go down there with you and hold your hand ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_You need me to go down there with you and hold your hand ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So you are strong enough to face her on your own ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh no , you will have to come .
